subcodes.title: Words to Sigurd Russell et al, spoken on 1904-04-13
subcodes.first_line: Whenever the heart is happy, the atmosphere is good, no matter what or where the place may be.
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
